Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Additive manufacturing of an ultrastrong, deformable Al alloy with nanoscale intermetallics

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition in at%; powder size -53+15 um gas atomized by Atlantic Equipment Engineering, Inc.

Process_Text.original: Gas atomized spherical powder (-53+15 um) fabricated by LPBF (SLM 125 HL) in Argon atmosphere (oxygen <1000 PPM) using 400 W IPG fiber laser (lambda=1070 nm); laser power 200-300 W, scan speed 1200 mm/s, hatch space 100 um, layer thickness 30 um, spot size 70 um; build plate preheated to 200 C, layer rotation 67 deg.
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF of Al92Ti2Fe2Co2Ni2 powder with laser power 200-300 W, scan speed 1200 mm/s, layer thickness 30 um, hatch spacing 100 um, in Ar atmosphere.

Process_Info.Equipment: SLM 125 HL metal 3D printer; IPG fiber laser 400 W

Microstructure_Text.original: Heterogeneous microstructure with coarse rosettes in melt pool center (36 vol.%) and fine rosettes near boundaries (97 vol.%). Fine rosettes have Al3Ti cores with alternating Al3Ti and Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2 lamellae (20-60 nm thick). Coarse rosettes have lamellae 150-300 nm thick. Cellular precipitates (4 vol.%) of Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2 in coarse rosette regions. Al matrix: 60 vol.% in center, 3 vol.% near boundaries. High-density defects in Al3Ti; Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2 relatively defect-free. Orientation relationship: [130]Al3Ti // [100]Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2, (002)Al3Ti // (001)Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Heterogeneous rosette microstructure: fine rosettes (20-60 nm lamellae) near melt pool boundaries, coarse rosettes (150-300 nm lamellae) in melt pool center; Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2 and Al3Ti intermetallics with Al matrix.

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Bulk compression tests; strain rate 1e-3 s-1
Properties_Info.Note: 200 W laser power; ultra-high engineering stress exceeding 800 MPa
Fine rosette regions: 140-150 GPa; coarse rosette regions: 130-140 GPa

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Multiple loading-unloading micropillar compression; fine rosette region
Properties_Info.Note: Prominent back stress ~600 MPa in fine rosette regions with higher flow strength

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Multiple loading-unloading micropillar compression; coarse rosette region
Properties_Info.Note: Back stress ~250 MPa in coarse rosette regions
200 W laser power; substantial plastic deformability ~20% with barreling phenomenon

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Bulk compression; 250-300 W laser power; strain rate 1e-3 s-1
Bulk compression tests on MTS framework with 30 kN load cell; strain rate 1e-3 s-1; cylindrical specimens 6x12 mm
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Cylindrical specimens: height 12 mm, diameter 6 mm
Properties_Info.Note: 200 W laser power; engineering stress exceeding 800 MPa with ~20% plastic strain

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Bulk compression tests; 250-300 W laser power; strain rate 1e-3 s-1
Properties_Info.Note: 250 W and 300 W laser power; flow stress decreases to 550 MPa with 5-20% compressive strain

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: In situ SEM micropillar compression; 300 W laser; fine rosette region; strain rate 5e-3 s-1; micropillar: height 10 um, diameter 5 um, aspect ratio 2:1
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: FIB-fabricated micropillars: height 10 um, diameter 5 um; 10 and 20 um diamond flat-punch tips
Properties_Info.Note: Fine rosette regions can exceed 900 MPa; true flow stress reaching 1 GPa; engineering stress 1.18 GPa; at least 15% plasticity

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: In situ SEM micropillar compression; 300 W laser; coarse rosette region; strain rate 5e-3 s-1
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: FIB-fabricated micropillars: height 10 um, diameter 5 um
Properties_Info.Note: Coarse rosette region flow stress ~500 MPa

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Berkovich tip, displacement-control mode, 800 nm depth, 100x100 um area with 121 indents (10 um spacing)
Properties_Info.Note: Fine rosette regions near melt pool boundaries: 3.5-4.5 GPa; coarse rosette regions in melt pool center: 2.5-3.0 GPa

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Considere criterion analysis on true stress-strain curves
Properties_Info.Note: Uniform deformation strain at 7% followed by long toughing stages
